title: 下载：杰夫·范德米尔 (Jeff VanderMeer) 的独家故事和人工智能模型太可怕了，无法发布
content: 这是今天的《下载》版本，这是我们的平日时事通讯，每天提供技术世界中正在发生的事情。星座  ——《星座》是杰夫·范德米尔（Jeff VanderMeer）的短篇小说，他是广受好评的畅销书《南境》系列的作者。 &
original_title: The Download: an exclusive Jeff VanderMeer story and AI models too scary to release
original_content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Constellations  —Constellations is a short story by Jeff VanderMeer, the author of the critically acclaimed, bestselling Southern Reach series. &

title: StaRPO：稳定性增强强化策略优化
content:
arXiv:2604.08905v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：强化学习（RL）可以有效提高大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中的准确性。现有的强化学习策略优化框架依赖最终答案的正确性作为反馈信号，很少捕获内部日志
original_content:
arXiv:2604.08905v1 Announce Type: new

title: Zoonova AI 推出 Alpha AI，为日常投资者带来量化驱动的分析
content: 定价和供货情况 Alpha AI 可通过 Zoonova AI 网络平台购买，价格为每年 240 美元。核心功能仍然可以通过 Zoonova AI 移动应用程序使用，该应用程序目前免费......
original_title: Zoonova AI Launches Alpha AI, Bringing Quant-Driven Analytics to Everyday Investors
original_content: Pricing and Availability Alpha AI is available through the Zoonova AI web platform for 240 per year. Core features also remain available through the Zoonova AI mobile app, which is currently free to ...

title: 微软正在开发另一个类似 OpenClaw 的代理
content: 新功能将面向企业客户，与众所周知的高风险开源 OpenClaw 代理相比，具有更好的安全控制。
original_title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
original_content: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

title: 特朗普官员可能鼓励银行测试 Anthropic 的神话模型
content: 该报告尤其令人惊讶，因为国防部最近宣布 Anthropic 为供应链风险。
original_title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
original_content: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

title: Anthropic 暂时禁止 OpenClaw 的创建者访问 Claude
content: 这项禁令是在上周 Claude 对 OpenClaw 用户的定价发生变化后实施的。
original_title: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
original_content: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

title: OpenClaw 给用户带来了另一个对安全性感到恐惧的理由
content: 这种病毒式 AI 代理工具让攻击者能够悄悄地获得未经身份验证的管理员访问权限。
original_title: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
original_content: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.
